attributes.action: Change child sexual assault laws to minimum of 15 years
attributes.additional_details: Child sexual assault remains one of the most heinous crimes, leaving indelible marks not only on the victims but also on their families and communities. Despite the severity of this crime, existing legislation fails to adequately reflect the lifelong consequences endured by survivors. Current sentences for perpetrators vary significantly, often resulting in unjustly lenient punishments that fail to correspond to the gravity of their offenses.
attributes.background: For the minimum sentence of child sexual assault to change to 15 years over all categories. Only in grey areas should there be a reduction in the sentence for a child sex offender.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Mandatory 15-year minimum sentence for all child sexual offences
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761652
